page.title: System Settings
page.description: Manage authentication, email, webhooks, and other platform configuration.

encryption.title: Encryption & Backup
encryption.description: Manage database encryption and data backup.
encryption.confirmDescription: This will change the encryption master password. You must use the new password to unlock the system after the next restart. Make sure you remember it.
encryption.changeSuccess: Master password changed successfully. Use the new password on next restart.
encryption.changeNote: Changing the password re-encrypts the database key with a new derived key pair. The database itself is not re-encrypted. Takes effect on next unlock.
encryption.disabled: Database encryption is disabled (DB_ENCRYPTION=false). Encryption settings cannot be modified in this mode.

export.title: Data Export
export.description: Export selected modules as a JSON backup file. Audit logs, sessions, and temporary data are excluded.
export.passwordPlaceholder: Enter your master password to verify
export.noEncryption: Export selected modules as a JSON backup file. Audit logs, sessions, and temporary data are excluded.
export.confirmDescription: This will generate and download a JSON backup of the selected modules. Audit logs and session data will be excluded.

import.title: Data Import
import.description: Import data from a previously exported JSON backup file. This will overwrite existing data in the affected modules.
import.passwordPlaceholder: Enter your master password to verify
import.confirmDescription: This is a destructive operation. All existing data in the following modules will be replaced with the imported data:
import.confirmIncludeUsersOn: Users, groups, and preferences WILL be overwritten.
import.confirmIncludeUsersOff: Users, groups, and preferences will be skipped.

auth.sessionDescription: Configure session lifetime and default administrators.

smtp.title: Email (SMTP)
smtp.description: Configure SMTP server for sending notification emails.

webhook.title: Webhooks
webhook.description: Configure webhook endpoints to receive event notifications.
webhook.noWebhooks: No webhooks configured. Click "Add Webhook" to get started.
webhook.eventsHint: Comma-separated event types, or * for all events.
